title: gundlachia domingensis
intro: Gundlachia domingensis, also known as yerba de gato or cat's herb, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Gundlachia domingensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
